title: polygala triquetra
intro: Polygala triquetra, also known as Whorled Milkwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Polygalaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Polygala triquetra include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Polygala triquetra are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea or by drying them to produce a powder for capsules or tinctures.
